---
format: "html"
---

## Courses

1. Python
2. [Applied Data Science](W2/index.qmd)
3. [Applied Machine Learning](W3/index.qmd)
4. Applied Deep Learning
5. [Agentic AI](W5/index.qmd)
6. Fullstack Python Apps with Agentic Engineering

[Click to access the Schedule](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1I8qq_lphrymOCXXQTBf7ieL2SdGovz_wwqj93PLz2mQ/edit?usp=sharing)

## Pre-requisites

- Python Basics. To prepare or refresh: [المقدمة البايثونية للبرمجة باللغة العربية](https://halgoz.quarto.pub/pythonia/)

### Slides Tips

- `Ctrl+click` to zoom
- `Esc` to navigate the slides
- `M` to navigate from the outline
- `E` to view slides concatenated as one page
